text.title: practices-js-ts-stack Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for practices-js-ts-stack as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Props typed as `any` or as a bare object `{ variant: string, children: any }`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats TypeScript's type system; agents propagate `any` through the component tree silently.

failure-mode.description: Adding `"strict": false` or casting with `as any` to suppress TypeScript errors during development.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Errors suppressed this way surface in production as runtime crashes. Agents copy the pattern and progressively weaken the type system.
